expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Reports on all 5 systems individually with bullet points

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: Shows Running, Connected, Synced, and Idle statuses for each system
States all 5 systems are operational and no systems are down or stale

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: Uses a bold header and structured bullet list with a summary paragraph
